global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with geometric shapes and clear text elements promoting a cashback offer.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting feel.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle and a circle are centered, both in a lighter shade of orange, creating a modern and abstract visual.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle in a lighter shade of orange, positioned towards the center, adds a decorative touch.

elements.label: Medium rectangle
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangle in a lighter shade of orange, placed slightly below the center, enhances the geometric theme.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle in a lighter shade of orange, positioned below the medium rectangle, complements the overall design.

elements.label: Cashback offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Earn cashback daily' is prominently displayed, conveying the main offer clearly.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fast signup instant card

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The 'NovaPay' logo appears in white text at the top, featuring a modern font that stands out against the orange background.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A white button with the text 'Learn more' at the bottom, inviting users to take action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern and vibrant, cashback offer, NovaPay logo, Learn more button
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, Fast signup, instant card, NovaPay, Learn more
